title: AppSec Core Ontology Research: Curated Research Program Release v1.0.0
description:
Curated research program release v1.0.0 for the AppSec Core Ontology Research line. This release includes three related papers and release-grade artifacts covering application security ontology design, coverage-preserving knowledge compilation, and ontology-grounded retrieval for LLM-assisted security workflows.

This release also includes a frozen mirror of the Paper 4 experimental design, pre-registered on the Open Science Framework (DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/H5AJE). The OSF registration is the canonical, immutable version; the mirror in this release exists for citation convenience, backup, and offline access. See papers/04-empirical-evaluation/README.md for the full mirror policy.

Homepage: https://www.securitybydesign.dev
Published manual: https://www.securitybydesign.dev/sbd-toe/sbd-manual/
OSF research program project: https://osf.io/yxvmh

creators.name: Farinha, Pedro
creators.affiliation: Independent Researcher / Shiftleft - Secure Software Engineering, Lda.
